html:
Exclusive to:  

The Cat Cap is a Hat Item found in the Clothing Filter and Winter Items Filter. It requires 1 Cat Tails and 4 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.

Cat Caps restore 3.3 Sanity/min while worn and are tier 1 warm clothing items, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. They have an insulation factor of 60.

Since Catcoons can easily go extinct on a map, and only drop their Cat Tails by chance, it is best to keep this Hat maintained with a Sewing Kit.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Distinguished Puppy Cap skin was introduced during the official Year of the Varg event in 2018.
  • The Distinguished Tied Trapper Hat and Trapper Hat skins are only obtainable during the official Year of the Gobbler event.
  • The Loyal Slick Tuft Cap skin was awarded for playing Don't Starve Together between April 2, 2025 and some days after it.
Woven - Distinguished
Year of the Varg Collection
Puppy Cap
Not made of real puppies.
See ingame
Distinguished
Lunar New Year Collection
Tied Trapper Hat
This trapper hat appears to have been permanently tied up. Luckily it looks stylish that way.
See ingame
Distinguished
Lunar New Year Collection
Trapper Hat
This trapper hat is soft and cozy, but the ends don't seem to tie up anymore.
See ingame
Loyal
Fool's Collection
Slick Tuft Cap
Show'em how tuft you are!

Trivia

  • Since Catcoon is a portmanteau of "cat " and "raccoon", this item is most likely based on the real life Coonskin Cap, made most famous by the frontiersman Davy Crockett. Wickerbottom's quote references this by saying "Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do."
  • Visually, the Cat Cap also resembles an Ushanka Cap.
  • In older versions of Reign of Giants, the Cat Cap had resistance to wetness and was dropped outright by killing Catcoons.

Exclusive to:
Cat Cap
"For those who value warmth over friends."
Object Info
Perk
Restores sanity over time.
Delays Freezing.
+3.33/min
Equipable
10 days
Repaired By Sewing
Does not stack
Protection
60
Crafting
×1 ×4
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"catcoonhat"
“Ears hat!”
–Wilson
“Cuddly hat.”
–Willow
“Now Wolfgang not trust himself.”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing like the stench of death on my head.”
–Wendy
“FURRY HEAD COVERING”
–WX-78
“Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do.”
–Wickerbottom
“The traditional garb of the woodsman.”
–Woodie
“Dead head.”
–Maxwell
“For something fashioned from spider webs it's remarkably unsticky.”
–Wagstaff
“A furry cap! Blessings tö yöu, cute meat.”
–Wigfrid
“Hat of a cat.”
–Webber
“I can feel the spirits of catcoons that made it.”
–Walani
“Not quite my style.”
–Warly
“Hope none o'me mates catch me in this gettup.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HAST KITTY FOR MINE HEAD”
–Wilba
“Kitty thing for head”
–Wormwood
“It's like walking around with a cat on my head.”
–Wheeler
“Do I look like a fur trader?”
–Winona
“It's a stripey horn concealer.”
–Wortox
“Ha ha, is hat now.”
–Wurt
“Now this is a hat made for the wilderness!”
–Walter
“Their sacrifice will keep me warm and alive.”
–Wanda
The Cat Cap is a Hat Item found in the Clothing Filter and Winter Items Filter. It requires 1 Cat Tails and 4 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.
Cat Caps restore 3.3 Sanity/min while worn and are tier 1 warm clothing items, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. They have an insulation factor of 60.
Since Catcoons can easily go extinct on a map, and only drop their Cat Tails by chance, it is best to keep this Hat maintained with a Sewing Kit.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Mèo là Vật phẩm Mũ được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Quần áo và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Mùa đông. Nó cần 1 Đuôi Mèo và 4 Tơ để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 50% độ bền của nó.
title: Cat Cap/DST

Delays [[Freezing]]. |freezingResistance = 60 |tier = 2 |objectSanity= +3.33/min |description = For those who value warmth over friends.}} {{Quotes |wilson=Ears hat! |willow=Cuddly hat. |wolfgang=Now Wolfgang not trust himself. |wendy=Nothing like the stench of death on my head. |wx78=FURRY HEAD COVERING |wickerbottom=Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do. |woodie=The traditional garb of the woodsman. |maxwell=Dead head. |wagstaff = For something fashioned from spider webs it's remarkably unsticky. |wigfrid=A furry cap! Blessings tö yöu, cute meat. |webber=Hat of a cat. |walani=I can feel the spirits of catcoons that made it. |warly=Not quite my style. |woodlegs=Hope none o'me mates catch me in this gettup. |wilba=WILBA HAST KITTY FOR MINE HEAD |wormwood=Kitty thing for head |wheeler=It's like walking around with a cat on my head. |winona=Do I look like a fur trader? |wortox=It's a stripey horn concealer. |wurt = Ha ha, is hat now. |walter = Now this is a hat made for the wilderness! |wanda = Their sacrifice will keep me warm and alive. |choose=woodie}} The '''Cat Cap''' is a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] found in the [[Clothing Filter]] and [[Winter Items Filter]]. It requires 1 [[Cat Tail]]s and 4 [[Silk]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 50% of its durability. Cat Caps restore 3.3 [[Sanity]]/min while worn and are ''tier 1'' warm clothing items, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. They have an [[Freezing#Game Mechanics|insulation factor]] of 60. Since [[Catcoons]] can easily go extinct on a map, and only drop their Cat Tails by chance, it is best to keep this Hat maintained with a Sewing Kit. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Distinguished Puppy Cap''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Varg]] event in 2018. * The '''Distinguished Tied Trapper Hat''' and '''Trapper Hat''' skins are only obtainable during the official [[Year of the Gobbler]] event. * The '''Loyal Slick Tuft Cap''' skin was awarded for playing Don't Starve Together between April 2, 2025 and some days after it.

Luckily it looks stylish that way. |ingame = Tied Trapper Hat Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Trapper Hat Icon.png |rarity = Distinguished |collection = Lunar New Year Collection |name = Trapper Hat |description = This trapper hat is soft and cozy, but the ends don't seem to tie up anymore. |ingame = Trapper Hat Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Slick Tuft Cap Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Fool's Collection |name = Slick Tuft Cap |description = Show'em how tuft you are! }}

Wickerbottom's quote references this by saying "Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do." * Visually, the Cat Cap also resembles an [[Wikipedia:Ushanka|Ushanka Cap]]. * In older versions of ''Reign of Giants'', the Cat Cap had resistance to wetness and was dropped outright by killing Catcoons. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Cat Cap= Cat Cap Dropped.png|Dropped Cat Cap Equipped.png|Winter Hat Equipped |-| Puppy Cap= Puppy Cap Dropped.png|Dropped Puppy Cap Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Tied Trapper Hat= Tied Trapper Hat Dropped.png|Dropped Tied Trapper Hat Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Trapper Hat= Trapper Hat Dropped.png|Dropped Trapper Hat Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Slick Tuft Cap= Slick Tuft Cap Dropped.png|Dropped Slick Tuft Cap Equipped.png|Equipped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Cat Cap Wilson.png|[[Wilson]] wearing a Cat Cap.
